Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Business_Specialists.asp

# SBDC Business Specialist Referral Process

## What this process covers
The UH SBDC Business Specialists page says existing SBDC clients should contact their advisor, who coordinates with the appropriate specialist. New clients should first find their local SBDC and meet with an initial advisor. Specialist sessions are generally coordinated virtually.

## BOSS use
Route to this process when the user needs deeper expertise after basic advising:
- Accounting, bookkeeping, QuickBooks, contracts.
- Cybersecurity, business continuity, insurance standards.
- Human resources and compliance.
- Marketing, branding, LinkedIn, SEO, pitches, growth evaluation, or AI productivity.

## Important routing logic
Specialists are not the first step for a vague early-stage idea. For early-stage users, first route to local SBDC advising, then let the advisor coordinate the specialist.
